features: Dual 12V Cigarette Lighter Socket - Power up two devices at the same time with this 12V plug adapter! Charge your phones, tablets, and other electronics quickly and easily.
Fast USB Charging - Quickly charge two USB devices with this 12v charging plug. Perfect for cars, trucks, and boats. Get full-speed charging with no waiting. Ideal for busy travelers.

Compact Design - This dual 12v Cigerette Socket USB Car Charger has an ultra-compact design for easy and convenient use. Perfect for charging phones, tablets, and other devices with a 12v Cigerette Socket.

Overload Protection - Dual 12v Cigerette Lighter Socket adapter with overload protection guards your devices against short-circuit, high temperature and overcharging. Keeps your car charging safe and efficient.

Short Circuit Protection - Never worry about your device getting damaged with our car charger. Its short circuit protection guarantees safe and reliable use, so you can charge your device while on the go with confidence.
description: Product Description Fast USB Car Charger Dual Port Car Adapter Make sure your devices are always powered up with the Fast Usb Car Charger Dual 12v Cigerette Lighter Socket Adapter Charging plug. This fast charging adapter is perfect for your car, providing you with dual socket adapters and a USB charging plug. Its high-quality materials and universal compatibility make it an ideal choice for your charging needs. Its LED indicator light ensures safe and reliable operation, and its dual Cigerette Lighter Socket allows you to plug in two devices at the same time. Get the most out of your car charging experience with the Fast Usb Car Charger Dual 12v Cigerette Lighter Socket Adapter Charging plug. Sleek & Compact – Only 0.9cm protrusion when installed. A true flush fit that blends into your car's interior design. Power up your iPhone or Samsung in no time. Dual USB ports support fast charging with intelligent current shunt up to 3.1A combined. Plug in two devices at once! Charge your smartphone and power bank simultaneously with full power distribution. Equipped with an intelligent recognition chip – supports overcurrent, overvoltage, overheat & short circuit protection. Match the mainstream models on the market Experience unmatched charging convenience with our Fast Car Charger Dual USB Adapter. Its super mini ceramic design sits flush in your car’s cigarette lighter, offering a clean and non-intrusive look. Designed to work with 12V–24V vehicles, it’s the perfect companion whether you're driving a compact car, a family SUV, or a heavy-duty truck. The charger is built with dual intelligent USB outputs, providing up to 3.1A total current and 2.1A per port for rapid charging. Specifications: Compatible Model: Universal (Anything that requires USB power) Output Voltage: 3.1 A Number of Ports: 2 Type: Dual USB Car Charger Source: Car Lighter Slot Quality Certification: CE, RoHS, FCC, CCC Suitable: Most of Car Models Output Interface: USB Input: 12-24V/2.4A
